intent: Adapt light mode contrast across the frontend without changing dark mode, layout, or business behavior.
assumptions: The bug is primarily token/CSS drift rather than component behavior.
Dark mode must keep its current theme contract.
The existing dirty worktree contains unrelated changes and must not be reverted.
risks: The later CodePen Neuromorphic light token section overrides earlier light values.
Component CSS can bypass tokens through hardcoded colors.
Existing full frontend tests have unrelated failures.
steps: Add RED tests for light contrast tokens and CSS consumption paths.
Update only light-mode token overrides and light-specific variable hooks.
Route Upload modal backdrop through a theme variable while preserving the previous default for non-light themes.
Run focused tests, lint, build, and browser screenshots when possible.
Add a permanent constraint and update quality score.
